center.name: 日巴拉那
center.summary: 日巴拉那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-capped antthrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: amazonicus is found in Brazil south of the Amazon, from east Madeira to north Maranhão, and south of Ji-Paranã and Mato Grosso

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: amazonicus is found in Brazil south of the Amazon, from east Madeira to north Maranhão, and south of Ji-Paranã and Mato Grosso
